description: CompositionYellow mesh T-shirt made of 100% recyled polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has a round neck with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, graphic print on the front, graphic print along the left side seam on the back and brand logo in a reflective material on the left sleeveFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry cleanDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not iron on print or embroideryTake your running to the next level in this yellow T-shirt from nike. The mesh Dri-Fit fabric created from recycled content wicks sweat away from the skin to help keep you dry and comfortable, while the pinwheel graphic on the front with the bold graphic lettering of the word "Running" inspires you to do just that. Team this with track pants and performance shoes so that you can run longer and better.
